hero.title: Where kids fall in love with English!
hero.desc: Fun, personalised online English lessons for primary school children. Live online sessions, real progress, happy kids — and happy parents! 🎉
cta.title: Ready to start your child's English journey? 🚀
cta.desc: Spots are limited — enroll today and secure your preferred schedule.
home.actionDesc: From phonics to projects, reading to role-play — lessons built to keep kids curious and confident.
reviews.title: What families say
reviews.one: "My daughter is more confident speaking English and looks forward to every online lesson."
reviews.two: "The dashboard is very helpful. We can see homework, messages, and the next class clearly."
reviews.three: "The teacher feedback is warm and simple. It feels safe and organised for children."
pricing.title: Lesson options
pricing.desc: Choose the lesson format that fits your child and your family schedule.
pricing.flex.name: Flexible Sessions
pricing.flex.note: Book when needed, with no monthly commitment.
pricing.monthly.name: Premium Monthly
pricing.monthly.note: Fixed weekly schedule with monthly commitment and priority booking.
pricing.face.name: Face-to-Face
pricing.face.note: Premium service for families who specifically need in-person lessons.
pricing.policyDesc: Changes require at least 24 hours' notice. With less than 24 hours' notice, or if the student does not attend, the lesson is counted as completed and is not refunded or rescheduled.
how.title: How it works
how.desc: From enrollment to first lesson in just a few steps.
how.step1.title: Enroll online
how.step1.desc: Fill in the form — child's name, age, English level, session type. Takes 3 minutes.
how.step2.title: Pick your schedule
how.step2.desc: Flexible families can choose 1, 2, or 3 lessons per week. Monthly plan is fixed at 2 lessons per week.
how.step3.title: Transfer & confirm
how.step3.desc: After choosing your schedule, bank transfer details are shown. Your spot is confirmed when the transfer is received.
how.step4.title: Start learning!
how.step4.desc: Receive Google Meet link, access materials, chat with teacher — all in one place.
how.include.goal: Goal-based curriculum tailored to each child
how.include.reading: Reading activities, games, worksheets & vocab lists
how.include.chat: Direct chat with teacher via the platform
schedule.title: Weekly Schedule
schedule.desc: Until 31 July: 14:00, 15:00, 16:00, 19:00, 20:00, 21:00. From 1 August: weekday evenings, weekend daytime and evenings. 50 minutes each.
schedule.empty: Choose a date to see available private lesson times.
schedule.goodAvailability: Availability updates from the booking system.
schedule.goodNotice: Changes require at least 24 hours' notice.
schedule.goodWhatsapp: WhatsApp reminder sent 1 hour before each session.
schedule.goodOne: 1-on-1 lessons with flexible or monthly scheduling.
